KRAFTED

For every creative soul.

Professional reference board — images, video, audio, mind maps & more.

CREATED BY KINCHEUNG
V 5 . 4

Save Board

Full Package (.kpak) — ZIP archive with all images/videos/audio embedded. No size limits. Share with your team.

Lock & Save (.kpak) — Same as above, but encrypted with a password for extra security.

Chrome/Edge: you'll choose where to save. Other browsers: file downloads automatically.

Save with Password

Your file is locked. Save this password somewhere safe — it cannot be recovered.

Tip: The master password can also open this file as a backup.

🔒 Locked Board

This board was saved with a password. Enter the password to open it.

KRAFTED — Hotkeys & Guide

Tools

VSelect & Move
TText Tool
Ctrl+DDraw (pen/arrow/box)
EExport Area (drag select)
CCapture Area
Shift+CScreen Capture (full desktop)
XFree Cut Tool
LLasso Cut Tool
MMind Map Brainstorm
RRelation — connect items
GToggle Grid
HThis Help Panel
FCenter / Frame Selection
Shift+FApp Fullscreen

Editing

Ctrl+ZUndo
Ctrl+Shift+Z / YRedo
Ctrl+CCopy Selected
Ctrl+VPaste
Ctrl+Shift+DDuplicate
Ctrl+GGroup Selected
Ctrl+Shift+GUngroup
Ctrl+ASelect All
Ctrl+SSave Board
Ctrl+Shift+SCapture Tool
Ctrl+EExport Tool
Ctrl+LAdd Link Card
Ctrl+Shift+TTranslate EN to Chinese
DeleteDelete Selected
EscDeselect / Cancel

Alignment & Layout

Ctrl+ArrowNudge edge align
Ctrl+Alt+UpSame Size
Ctrl+Alt+DownSame Scale
Ctrl+Alt+SStack Items
Ctrl+Alt+Shift+UpDistribute H
Ctrl+Alt+Shift+DownDistribute V
Arrow KeysNudge (Shift = 20px)

Navigation

Space + DragPan Canvas
Mouse WheelZoom In/Out
Middle MousePan Canvas
Right ClickContext Menu

Features

Drag & DropImages, videos, audio files
Paste (Ctrl+V)Paste images, URLs, items
Click / SpacePlay / Pause video
J / KPrev / Next comment (hover video)
Double-clickPlay video / Edit text
Mind MapImages + Audio in nodes
Right-clickDownload source files
